services.title: Autonomous Systems Engineering
services.description: We design systems that can operate on their own with minimal human supervision, even in uncertain or changing environments.
points: Designing systems that monitor themselves and adjust automatically
Edge-based control systems for fast real-world responses
Combining data from multiple sensors for reliable decision making
Detecting problems early and enabling automatic recovery
Reducing the need for constant manual control or monitoring

services.title: Industrial & IoT System Stabilization
services.description: Many industrial or IoT systems technically work, but require frequent manual fixes or supervision. We help make these systems stable, reliable, and easier to operate.
points: Finding the root cause of crashes, instability, or unexpected behavior
Improving system logic and control flow
Reducing resets, failures, and manual overrides
Making systems easier for teams to operate with confidence

services.title: Edge & Control Architecture Design
services.description: We design system architectures where important decisions must happen close to the physical device, not just in the cloud.
points: Designing embedded and edge controller architectures
Handling real-time events and physical system responses
Creating reliable telemetry and monitoring pipelines
Coordinating cloud services with edge devices
Implementing safety mechanisms and fallback systems

services.title: Technical Diagnostics & Risk Reviews
services.description: Short diagnostic engagements to understand why a system behaves unpredictably or requires constant human supervision.
points: Clear analysis of failure modes and instability issues
Honest evaluation of what can and cannot be automated
Practical recommendations to reduce operational risk
A prioritized action plan for improving the system
